query:
SELECT 
  ticker,
  signal,
  units,
  ROUND(entryPrice, 4) as entry_price,
  ROUND(currentPrice, 4) as current_price,
  ROUND(currentSl, 4) as stop_loss,
  ROUND(currentTp, 4) as take_profit,
  ROUND(unrealizedPnl, 2) as open_pnl,
  ROUND(unrealizedPnlPct, 2) as open_pnl_pct,
  ROUND(zivScore, 1) as ziv_entry,
  ROUND(zivHScore, 1) as ziv_h_now,
  ROUND(allocatedCapital, 0) as allocated,
  openedAt,
  updatedAt
FROM paperPositions
WHERE status = 'open'
ORDER BY unrealizedPnl DESC;
